items.question: Is there parking at the venue?
items.answer: Yes — there’s plenty of complimentary parking at The Ryland Inn.

items.question: What’s the dress code?
items.answer: **Formal** — suits for men and floor or cocktail-length dresses for women. Summer colors are very welcome.
The ceremony begins at **6:00 pm** at The Ryland Inn. Please note we will be at the Grand Ballroom. The full run of the evening is on the [Schedule](<>).
items.question: What time does the ceremony start?
Can I bring a guest?
items.answer: Your invitation will name everyone we’ve saved a seat for, so it’ll say right on your RSVP if you have a plus one

items.question: Are kids invited?
items.answer: We love the children in our lives dearly, but this is a grown-ups’ evening.

items.question: Where are you registered?
items.answer: We’ve put together a small registry and a honeymoon fund — it’s all on the [Registry](registry.html) page. Truly, though, your being there is the gift.

items.question: How do I get there?
items.answer: If you are coming in from the city, the NJ Transit is very convenient to get to Whitehouse Station. There’s a route on the [Travel](travel.html) page — and the shuttle covers the hop from the hotel to the venue.

items.question: Is there a hotel block?
items.answer: Yes — we’re holding a room block at a nearby hotel, with a few other options close by. Details and booking links are on the [Travel](travel.html) page.

items.question: Is transportation provided?
items.answer: Yes — we’ll run a shuttle between the hotel block and the venue on the evening of the wedding, so you won’t need to drive if you're staying at the hotel. Times will be confirmed closer to the day.
